headline: Southwest limited-time offer: Earn up to 90,000 Rapid Rewards points before your summer vacation
summary: For a limited time this summer, you can earn an elevated welcome bonus with a new Southwest Rapid Rewards card. Here's what to know.

headline: Cathie Wood Hopes Her 3 Million American Airlines Miles Will One Day 'Translate' Into SpaceX Starship Miles So She Can Fly To The Moon Or Mars
summary: Cathie Wood, founder of ARK Invest, cheers Elon Musk's announcement of Starlink on American Airlines planes.
